subject: Recoome firing the Eraser Gun beam attack, mouth wide open in close-up action pose
description: A close-up action shot of a large humanoid figure with mouth gaping wide open, firing a massive energy beam. The figure's face fills much of the frame, with the open mouth serving as the focal point from which blinding pink-white energy erupts. The surrounding space is saturated with bright pink and white light effects and energy rings radiating outward. The figure wears white-and-orange battle armor visible at the shoulders. The composition is extremely tight, emphasizing the mouth-beam attack in a way that is visually chaotic and overwhelming.
foreground: large humanoid face with mouth wide open firing energy beam, pink-white energy explosion
background: pink-white energy saturation with ring effects
